name: Zoho People
tagline: AI-enhanced HR management platform with smart automation and analytics
description: Zoho People is a comprehensive cloud-based HR management system that leverages AI to streamline core HR operations. Its intelligent assistant Zia automates repetitive tasks, provides workforce analytics, and helps with employee query resolution. The platform covers attendance tracking, leave management, performance appraisals, time tracking, and employee self-service — all with smart automation rules and predictive insights.
features: AI assistant Zia for HR queries
pros: Very affordable pricing with free tier
Great for small to mid-size businesses
